creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Christopher Olsen <cwolsen@domainatlantic.com> -----

Sorry here is the new shar

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	coldfusion7
#	coldfusion7/Makefile
#	coldfusion7/pkg-descr
#	coldfusion7/pkg-list
#	coldfusion7/distinfo
#
echo c - coldfusion7
mkdir -p coldfusion7 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - coldfusion7/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >coldfusion7/Makefile << 'END-of-coldfusion7/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   coldfusion
X# Date created:        May 12, 2005
X# Whom:                Christopher Olsen <cwolsen@domainatlantic.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      coldfusion
XPORTVERSION=   7.0.2
XCATEGORIES=    www
XMASTER_SITES=  http://cupid.ubixos.com/
X
XPLIST_FILES=   apache-tomcat6.0/webapps/cfusion.war
X
XMAINTAINER=    cwolsen@domainatlantic.com
XCOMMENT=       Coldfusion 7
X
XUSE_JAVA=       YES
XJAVA_VERSION=   1.5+
XBUILD_DEPENDS=  ${LOCALBASE}/jdk1.5.0/bin/javac:${PORTSDIR}/java/jdk15 \
X                ${LOCALBASE/apache-tomcat6.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/tomcat6
X
X#MAN1=          coldfusion.1
X#MANCOMPRESSED= yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-coldfusion7/Makefile
echo x - coldfusion7/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >coldfusion7/pkg-descr << 'END-of-coldfusion7/pkg-descr'
XThis is a port of adobe's coldfusion 7.0.2 it will install a developer version if you have
Xa valid license you can enter that at any time through the coldfusion administration panel
X
XThis port also depends on tomcat6 and jdk15
X
Xsomeone please take this port over and write a man page
X
X
Xwww: http://www.adobe.com/
X
END-of-coldfusion7/pkg-descr
echo x - coldfusion7/pkg-list
sed 's/^X//' >coldfusion7/pkg-list << 'END-of-coldfusion7/pkg-list'
Xapache-tomcat6.0/webapps/cfusion.war
END-of-coldfusion7/pkg-list
echo x - coldfusion7/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >coldfusion7/distinfo << 'END-of-coldfusion7/distinfo'
XMD5 (coldfusion-7.0.2.tar.gz) = 4bc0eb7f0f7a563d9a9b71a5387f6b5a
XSHA256 (coldfusion-7.0.2.tar.gz) = 55351ef7ebb5c1fac55bdc2709435f43721bdfb0d6b0caea435c14ef1c308272
XSIZE (coldfusion-7.0.2.tar.gz) = 145330611
END-of-coldfusion7/distinfo
exit



----- End forwarded message -----
